'''Baron Starlock's hovercraft''' was the personal vehicle of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Gavern Starlock]]. [[BX-00]] recklessly drove the vehicle, and tried to run over [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. When [[Jagoda]] had Starlock arrested, he gave the hovercraft to his new royal advisor, C-3PO.<ref name="Droids 5" />

{{Veh-stub}}
